who: hospitality shift managers processing 5–15 compliance reports/month
offer: For hospitality shift managers processing 5–15 compliance reports/month, manual tracking causes late submissions. We automate compliance report filing instead of manual tracking and filing of compliance reports.
problem: Difficulty in compiling and filing compliance reports accurately and on time.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for hospitality shift managers
Indie Hackers discussions on compliance workflows
DM outreach to hospitality shift managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among shift managers
try_it: Let users try manual report entry and basic templates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
